Eazy-E, stage name Eric Lynn Wright was a Californian rapper, producer and record executive. Because he lived in a tough neighborhood in Los Angeles, he worked as a drug dealer, which allowed him to save money to create Ruthless Records.  He formed N.W.A along with Ice Cube, Dr. Dre, MC Ren and DJ Yella.  The success was huge and, despite the media not supporting them, their fans were bigger and their songs became part of the ghetto's soundtrack.  During the group released his first solo album in 1988, Eazy Duz It.
